positive: Minimalist illustration of a glowing celestial fox spirit (Huli Jing), sitting majestically on a crescent moon. The fox should be depicted with flowing, stylized tail fur and deep amber eyes. Surrounding elements include abstract glowing geometric star patterns and delicate, ethereal cherry blossom petals falling in slow motion. The style is a blend of modern Art Nouveau and clean Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock aesthetic. Color palette: deep indigo, soft gold, vibrant magenta, and luminous white. Composition must feature a strong, central silhouette that occupies the upper half of the frame, allowing for text placement below. Ideal for screen printing on apparel. High contrast, symmetrical design, crisp linework, vector graphic quality, solid block colors, no gradient fade.
